scope: Lane B credential-free verification for CLIProxyAPI helper and docs in worker-2 worktree

checks.name: Default helper targets CLIProxyAPI data plane
checks.detail: Default snippet uses provider cliproxyapi, model cliproxyapi/default, base_url http://127.0.0.1:8317/v1, wire_api responses, and env_key CLIPROXYAPI_PROXY_CLIENT_KEY.

checks.name: Management key rejected for Codex data plane
checks.detail: Helper exits non-zero when --env-key CLIPROXYAPI_MANAGEMENT_KEY is requested.

checks.name: Append and dry-run behavior covered
checks.detail: Dry-run with --append leaves target unchanged; append writes the provider block once; repeated append refuses without --force.

checks.name: No secret leakage in tests or evidence
checks.detail: Tests use only placeholder token text and env-key names; no live credentials are required or recorded.

checks.name: Docs static constraints covered
checks.detail: README and first-pass report mention CLIProxyAPI 8317, bridge/BFF, bubble path, and OpenCodex 10100 supersession without claiming live routing was performed.
